    locale: regenerate SJIS charmap from CLDR

    There are some noticable differences affecting the '\' and '~'
    characters between our current charmap and latest CLDR version.

    PR:             264299, 275444
    Reviewed by:    bapt
    Tested by:      uratan@miomio.jp
